risks: Reviewer docs must continue to avoid production-readiness or legal-advice claims.
Several parallel AgentOps feature surfaces remain in progress and should not be described as persisted AgentOps source of truth.
The generic /aletheia/agentops route remains fixture-backed and should be presented as a prototype/demo surface, while /aletheia/matters/[matterId]/agentops is the adapter-backed reviewer path.
Gate provenance is read-only view-layer mapping until backend/audit owners add first-class persisted GateResult audit events.
Command Center artifact links are in-page hash anchors until first-class artifact detail routes exist.
Full UI smoke is under recovery triage; focused route smoke should not be described as full release validation.
